text-block-1.title: Querying the Matrix
text-block-1.text:
To navigate the vast repository of data, you need to master JCR queries. Like querying the Matrix to find specific patterns in the code, JCR provides powerful query languages to locate exactly the content you need.

JCR supports multiple query languages including JCR-SQL2, XPath, and the Query Builder API.

code-block-1.title: JCR-SQL2 Query Example

text-block-2.title: Query Best Practices
text-block-2.text:
• Always set query limits to prevent performance issues
  • Use indexes for frequently queried properties
  • Prefer JCR-SQL2 over XPath for better performance
  • Use ISDESCENDANTNODE to limit search scope
  • Consider using the Query Builder API for complex queries
  • Cache query results when appropriate
